category.scope_note: Home and clinical medical device comparison, with focus on general electromedical devices.

title.en: China-to-Japan Medical Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国医疗器械进入日本：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國醫療器材進入日本：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China home and clinical electromedical device documentation against Japan PMD Act (薬機法) market authorization, MAH licensing, Foreign Manufacturer Registration, MHLW Ordinance 169 QMS, JIS T 0601-1 electrical safety, STED clinical evidence, and Japanese-language labelling requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用/临床电生理医疗器械文件与日本《药机法》市场授权、MAH许可、境外制造商登记、MHLW第169号令QMS、JIS T 0601-1电气安全、STED临床证据及日语标签要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用/臨床電生理醫療器材文件與日本《藥機法》市場授權、MAH許可、境外製造商登記、MHLW第169號令QMS、JIS T 0601-1電氣安全、STED臨床證據及日語標籤要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, PMDA review outcome, Registered Certification Body opinion, clinical evaluation, QMS audit result, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, manufacturers, and Marketing Authorization Holders should verify current Japan PMD Act classification, approval/certification/notification route, MAH licensing, Foreign Manufacturer Registration, QMS, labelling, and post-market obligations with qualified Japanese regulatory professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、PMDA审查结果、注册认证机构意见、临床评价、质量体系审核结果、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、制造商及市场授权持有人在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的日本监管专业人士核验现行《药机法》分类、批准/认证/届出路线、MAH许可、境外制造商登记、质量管理体系、标签及上市后义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、PMDA審查結果、登錄認證機關意見、臨床評價、品質系統審核結果、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、製造商及市場授權持有人在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的日本監管專業人士核驗現行《藥機法》分類、批准/認證/届出路線、MAH許可、境外製造商登記、品質管理體系、標籤及上市後義務。

answer_first.en: Japan's PMD Act requires a licensed Japanese Marketing Authorization Holder (MAH) — a Chinese manufacturer cannot hold the authorization directly — plus Foreign Manufacturer Registration, MHLW Ordinance 169 QMS compliance (with possible PMDA site inspection), and full Japanese-language labelling; JIS T 0601-1 electrical safety partially transfers from GB 9706 given their shared IEC 60601-1 base, but Japan-specific deviations require a gap analysis.
answer_first.zh: 日本《药机法》要求持证日本市场授权持有人（MAH）——中国制造商不可直接持有批件——同时须完成境外制造商登记、满足MHLW第169号令QMS合规要求（可能须接受PMDA现场检查），并使用完整日语标签；JIS T 0601-1电气安全基于与GB 9706共同的IEC 60601-1基础，部分可转移，但日本特有偏差须进行差距分析。
answer_first.zht: 日本《藥機法》要求持證日本市場授權持有人（MAH）——中國製造商不可直接持有批件——同時須完成境外製造商登記、滿足MHLW第169號令QMS合規要求（可能須接受PMDA現場檢查），並使用完整日語標籤；JIS T 0601-1電氣安全基於與GB 9706共同的IEC 60601-1基礎，部分可轉移，但日本特有偏差須進行差距分析。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, registered certification body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted. PMDA (pmda.go.jp), MHLW (mhlw.go.jp), and JISC (jisc.go.jp) are the authoritative sources for Japan.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
